data.title: Corning Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Corning Incorporated's Board of Directors, listed under NYSE as GLW, announced a quarterly dividend of $0.28 per share. Shareholders of record as of May 29, 2026, will receive the dividend on June 29, 2026. The company cautions about forward-looking statements that involve terms like “will,” “believe,” “anticipate,” “expect,” “intend,” “plan,” and “seek” in this release. These statements, along with management's comments, do not constitute historical facts or information.

data.title: Newrez Study Finds Homeowners Insurance Premium Rate of Growth Slowed, Despite 64% Increase Since 2021
data.description: A leading mortgage lender and servicer, Newrez, revealed data from a study on approximately 1.2 million residential mortgage loans they service. The analysis showed a significant 64% surge in the average annual homeowners insurance premium from $1,597 at the end of 2021 to $2,625 by the end of 2025. Homeowners experienced double-digit premium hikes in the years 2022 to 2024. Additional details and the complete study are available for reference.

data.title: Penry Psychology Expands Neuroaffirming ADHD Assessments to 43 States via PSYPACT
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in Fairhope, Alabama, Dr. Katie Penry, a licensed clinical psychologist, announced the expansion of her ADHD assessment services to residents in 43 states participating in PSYPACT. This move aims to provide specialized services to a wider population.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Fora/
data.description: Fora has been recognized as one of the TIME100 Most Influential Companies for the year 2026. The announcement was made on April 30, 2026 by Fora via PR Newswire. Updates have been implemented since the initial news release. Fora's inclusion in the TIME100 list signifies its impactful presence in the business world. Additional information regarding this prestigious recognition can be found in the corrected release.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Educational Vistas Inc./
data.description: Educational Vistas Inc. has recently announced a new partnership with ROBOTIX Hands-on Learning, aimed at broadening STEM and digital literacy offerings for schools. The collaboration, revealed on 30-Apr-2026 through PR Newswire, seeks to enhance educational opportunities for students. This initiative signifies a significant step forward in promoting hands-on learning experiences in the fields of science, technology, engineering, and math. By teaming up with ROBOTIX, Educational Vistas Inc. aims to provide increased access to innovative and engaging educational resources.

data.title: Chance Raises $3M+ in Funding to Unite the World’s TCG Collectors
data.description: In Los Angeles, Chance Studios Inc. has successfully secured $3.2 million in funding for their superapp designed for trading card game (TCG) collectors. The funding round saw a significant investment from prominent firms Makers Fund and Hashed, along with contributions from Arbitrum Gaming Ventures, Gam3Girl Ventures, and Digital Elm. This collaboration has brought together an impressive group of esteemed consumer, gaming, and technology investors in a highly competitive funding landscape.

data.title: Casago Partners with Roam to Offer Flexible Cancellation While Protecting Homeowner Income
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona, Casago, a leading franchise-driven vacation rental management firm, revealed a collaboration with Roam. This partnership will grant Casago franchise partners entry to Roam's platform, which permits adaptable cancellations for guests and safeguards homeowner earnings in case of cancellations. Through this partnership, Casago operators can provide more advantageous cancellation policies, ensuring confidence by utilizing Roam's revenue protection platform. This collaboration will enable operators to offer increased flexibility and competitive cancellation terms to guests.

data.title: SAS and Dude Perfect achieve GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS™ title to mark company's 50th anniversary
data.description: Over 1,300 attendees at the SAS Innovate event in Dallas on April 30, 2026, successfully set a new record for the most people performing a double high-five simultaneously. This achievement was led by the popular entertainment group Dude Perfect, along with SAS customers, users, partners, and employees. The event garnered significant attention and participation, showcasing the collaborative and inclusive spirit of the gathering.

data.title: A New Frontier in Sovereign Assets: William Welser IV Unveils The Story Economy as a Decisive Alternative to the Failing Attention Economy
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in Austin, Texas, William Welser IV, a technologist, published a detailed guide in light of the increasing disruption from artificial intelligence and the breakdown of conventional data privacy systems. The playbook outlines strategies for navigating the forthcoming era of value exchange in the wake of these challenges.

data.title: DOVE ADVANCES HAIRCARE INNOVATION WITH NEW UV REPAIR & GLOW COLLECTION, DESIGNED TO REPAIR AND PROTECT HAIR FROM UV DAMAGE
data.description: Dove Hair has introduced a new product, the Dove UV Repair & Glow Collection, aimed at combating the second-leading cause of hair damage. This innovation provides UV protection to hair, especially in areas with high exposure. The launch took place in Hoboken, New Jersey on April 30, 2026. This new collection offers a science-driven solution to a significant beauty issue.

data.title: NSF Expands Food Equipment Portfolio with Electrical Safety Testing and Certification
data.description: In Ann Arbor, Michigan, NSF, a prominent organization focused on safeguarding human health, has broadened its food equipment services by including electrical safety testing and certification. Sam Cole, NSF's Director of Food Equipment, emphasized the organization's longstanding history of over 80 years in establishing sanitation standards and certifications for the food equipment sector. The emphasis on meeting sanitation and electrical safety criteria is crucial for manufacturers selling products in this industry.

data.title: Summer Road Announces Shareholders Have Overwhelmingly Elected Rory A. Held to Ingles Markets’ Board of Directors
data.description: Summer Road LLC, a significant shareholder owning around 3% of Class A common stock of Ingles Markets, Incorporated (NASDAQ: IMKTA), shared insights on the results of the Company’s 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. Following preliminary votes, their nominee Rory A. Held secured a seat on Ingles’ Board of Directors with strong backing from approximately.

data.title: Arcadia University and Acts Retirement-Life Communities Announce Workforce Development Partnership
data.description: Two organizations, Arcadia University and Acts Retirement-Life Communities, are teaming up to enhance employee development and bolster talent pools. This collaboration will provide Acts team members with the opportunity to enroll in over 150 industry-recognized certificate programs. The focus will be on areas such as allied health, skilled trades, and leadership development. This initiative aims to equip employees with essential skills and certifications to enhance their professional growth and development within the organization.

data.title: Atlas Cup announces "Atlas Cup: Proving Grounds," a collegiate orbital racing competition - inaugural races scheduled for 2028
data.description: The inaugural professional orbital racing league, Atlas Cup, based in San Francisco, revealed their latest addition of "Atlas Cup: Proving Grounds," a collegiate orbital racing championship set to take place in 2028 alongside the first professional season. This new competitive event will provide a platform for college racers to showcase their skills. Founded in 2026, Atlas Cup aims to revolutionize the world of orbital racing and attract a wide audience.

data.title: AUDIBLE OPENS DOORS TO FIRST-EVER BOOKLESS BOOKSTORE
data.description: The Audible Story House, a unique space known as the Listening Lounge and Community Hub, is set to welcome the public in New York City from May 1 to May 31. This event will showcase a variety of events and panels, featuring prominent figures like Lily Chu, Matt James, Leon Neyfakh, and others. The venue is expected to host dozens of activities throughout the month, bringing together audiobook enthusiasts and individuals interested in storytelling. This initiative by Audible, a key player in the industry, aims to provide an engaging experience for visitors and highlight the importance of storytelling in a dynamic and immersive environment.
